title: Pan-Seared Pierogi with Smoked Boudin and Gooey Onions
description: A hearty Ukrainian-inspired dish featuring pan-seared pierogi topped with smoked boudin and gooey onions.
instructions: Heat the butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the sliced onions and cook until caramelized, stirring occasionally.
Add the sliced boudin to the skillet and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Add the pierogi to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
Transfer the pierogi to a plate and top with the boudin and onion mixture.
Garnish with chopped fresh dill and serve immediately.
